title: Takeout's More Ores!
description: This mod adds in some new ores like Refined Diamond, Zircon and Sapphire!
body:
# **WARNING! FABRIC AND FORGE VERSIONS HAVE DIFFERENT FEATURES!!! PLEASE READ THE CHANGELOGS TO SEE WHICH VERSION HAS WHICH FEATURES!!!**

**PLEASE REPORT ALL BUGS TO THE DISCORD!**

# WHY SHOULD YOU DOWNLOAD THIS MOD?
What makes this mod different to any other regular ores mod, is it won't only add in new ores, but more block types for vanilla ores!

This mod also doesn't just add more ores, but tools, block types, music discs and more! All to come soon!

This mod is my first minecraft mod, so if you want to support a first time developer then download this!

This mod adds in quite a few decoration blocks!  

## Adds

- Refined Diamond
- Refined Diamond Shard
- Refined Diamond Block + Blocktypes
- Refined Diamond Tools + Armour
- Sapphire
- Sapphire Block + Blocktypes
- Sapphire Tools + Armour
- Zircon 
- Zircon Block + Blocktypes
- Zircon Tools + Armour
- Earium
- Earium Block + Blocktypes
- Thimeite
- Thimeite Block + Blocktypes
- Thimeite Tools + Armour
- Plungite Block
- Plungite
- Plungite Tools
- Multiversium Block
- Multiversium
- Multiversium Tools
- Ore world gens
- Thimeite music disc + bar brawl music disc
  
----

### TO DO LIST
- Music Discs
- Custom wood type
- Finish the ####### ore
- Finish Parity in between Fabric and Forge Versions

!KNOWN ERRORS!
- Certain blocks don't drop and take ages to mine
- Certain ores may not generate correctly, or may not be mineable

This mod is still being worked on! Just not enough to release an actual new update, it's on it's way though!
